hero_lead: What this site collects and how it is used. Updated July 2026.
section_1_body: The only personal information this site collects is what you choose to enter into the contact form: first name, last name, email address, organization (optional), the topic you select, and your message.
section_2_body: Form submissions are used solely to respond to your enquiry. We don't add you to a mailing list or share your details with anyone outside Infinite Sum Modeling as a result of contacting us.
section_3_body: Submitting the contact form sends your information to FormSubmit.co, a third-party form-delivery service, which forwards it to our inbox by email. This site's typefaces are loaded from Google Fonts, which involves a request to Google's servers when the page loads.
section_4_body: As of this writing, this site does not use analytics, tracking cookies, or advertising pixels of any kind.
section_5_body: We keep messages sent through the contact form only as long as needed to respond to you. If you'd like a message deleted sooner, just let us know.
section_6_body: For anything related to this policy or your data, email sumathi@infisum.com.
